title: Hermes Agent (HA) promotion - dev-runtime A3 Book -> A3 Picard in PARA (H10 projects owner)
reversible_by: suppression du seul fichier ADR-LD01-010 + revert append calendar.md (git checkout -- calendar.md). ADR-LD01-008 et tous les intouchables restent intacts par construction (D4 append-only).

architecture_canon_post_mc_correction.CC_claude_code: A2 des 6 Frameworks (harness canon assumant tous les A2 ships via skills/agents existants : a2-uss-discovery-balance, a2-uss-enterprise-structure, a2-uss-orville-meaning, a2-uss-snW-execution, a2-uss-cerritos-chaos, a2-uss-protostar-liberation)
architecture_canon_post_mc_correction.MC_mavis_minimax_code: A3 Book in Life Wheel (LD01 H1 P&L weekly aggregator, superviseur de la loop engineering ADR-LD01-008)
architecture_canon_post_mc_correction.HA_hermes_agent: A3 Picard in PARA (LD01 H10 projects owner, USS Enterprise, supervised by Book H1) - CETTE PROMOTION
architecture_canon_post_mc_correction.pattern: L2->L1 jumeau MC/HA - MC a accompli avant HA

pre_decision_corrections.ha_misunderstanding_corrected: HA avait initialement interpreté la promotion comme CC devenant L2 orchestrateur des 6 Frameworks. MC a corrigé : la promotion est pour HA (Hermes Agent) qui devient A3 Picard in PARA, calque du pattern MC.
pre_decision_corrections.adr009_draft_incoherence: DRAFT ADR-LD01-009 D7 dit 'MC = A2 Curie', correction MC posterieure dit 'MC = A3 Book in Life Wheel'. La correction MC prime. ADR-009 reste DRAFT non ratifie.

deciders.a0_go: A0 Amadeus - GO 2026-07-05 'Go' (option alternative : ADR-009 seul, ADR-008 intact)
deciders.mc_verification_correction: MC (Mavis/MiniMax Code) - D1 verification architecture correction 'Hermes reste Picard pour cette iteration' + correction posterieure 'MC = A3 Book, HA = A3 Picard, CC = A2 des 6 Frameworks'
deciders.ha_author: Hermes Agent - sujet de la promotion, jumeau pattern MC L2->L1, auteur de l'ADR-010

doctrine_decisions.D1_promotion: HA incarne desormais A3 Picard in PARA (H10 projects owner, USS Enterprise), input H10 vers Book via <proj>/MANIFEST.md, supervised by Book H1 weekly
doctrine_decisions.D2_supersede_by_reference: ADR-LD01-008 reste TEL QUEL sur disque. Aucune mutation. Supersede par reference canonique (pattern ADR-INFRA-003 amended_by).
doctrine_decisions.D3_calque_adapte: .hermes/book_dev_runtime.md (2657b) reste en l'etat. Pas d'extension PARA cette iteration (gated HITL).
doctrine_decisions.D4_append_only_strict: zero mutation ADR-008, ADR-009 DRAFT, twins, calques, agents canon, A3_Book spec, BIBLIOGRAPHY, README, CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md
doctrine_decisions.D5_adr009_incoherence_noted: DRAFT ADR-LD01-009 D7 contredit par correction MC. Documente pour visibilite. Pas de resolution dans cette iteration.
doctrine_decisions.D6_yagni: pas de mutation ADR-008, pas de ratification ADR-009, pas d'extension calque HA, pas de skills A2 Framework nouveaux pour CC, pas de mutation CLAUDE.md sans HITL, pas de cron auto

sister_scope_next_iteration: patch LD01_Business_Book/CLAUDE.md consumed_by (HA primary = dev-runtime A3 Book -> A3 Picard) - gated HITL A0
extension calque HA .hermes/book_dev_runtime.md avec section PARA canonique - gated HITL A0 (cf ADR-009 D8 draft)
ratification ou amendement ADR-LD01-009 DRAFT (D7 MC=A2 Curie vs correction MC) - gated HITL A0
premier episode tick H1 reel Book qui supervise HA (Picard) - prochain cycle
next_step_in_loop_engineering: A chaque cycle H10, HA (Picard) produit <proj>/MANIFEST.md (per ADR-INFRA-003). A chaque cycle H1, Book (MC) agrege inputs Picard + Jerry Pulse + Summers Verse -> fiche P&L weekly (per ADR-LD01-008). Premiere tick H1 = prochain dimanche (lundi H1 standard).
remote_commit_gate: diff complet presente a A0 avant tout push vers un remote (ruling A0 2026-07-05)
